title: Create a workspace with different account_product through API
excerpt:

posts.author: marcelo1 (Marcelo Araujo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

I’m trying to create a new workspace and I noticed that it always goes to “core” account_product. I would like to create a workspace directly on “software” account_product and make it appears on Monday Dev product.

I can make a query and get the account_product.kind but I couldn’t find any way to create a workspace and use that parameter.

Is it possible? Could you guys help me on this?

Thank you!
